mapper.select:
SELECT b.book_id, b.book_title, b.cover_image, b.author_name, b.book_price FROM book b ORDER BY b.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT b.book_id, b.book_title, b.cover_image, b.author_name, b.book_price FROM book b
WHERE b.book_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{_parameter}, '%') OR b.author_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{_parameter}, '%') OR b.publisher LIKE CONCAT('%', #{_parameter}, '%')
ORDER BY b.created_at DESC

SELECT book_id, book_title, cover_image, author_name, book_price FROM book WHERE MATCH(book_title, author_name, publisher) AGAINST(#{book_title} WITH QUERY EXPANSION) AND book_id != #{book_id} LIMIT 5
